title: fumaria abortiva
intro: Fumaria abortiva, also known as small cress or common fumitory, is a flowering plant belonging to the fumitory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fumaria abortiva include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive problems like diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Fumaria abortiva can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
